title: Insurgents
description: Add Enemy AI with firearms to have conflicts with.
body:
**NONE OF THE SOUNDS ARE MINE, AND ALL BELONG TO "NEW WORLD INTERACTIVE"**

-------

Watch the (half) Trailer :3

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/J4ehZ8mwmzc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

-------
"Insurgents" is a mod designed to add AI into your minecraft world to fight against! These AI have access to firearms and are here to find and kill you. The idea of this mod comes from the game "Insurgency (2014)"

**Q: Why did I make this mod?**\
A: I felt like there was nothing to fight against when using gun mods in minecraft. Now when you play survival, you have something to have conflicts with and this generally is supposed to turn the game into a PVPVE FPS. There was also **NOT A SINGLE MOD ON THE FACE OF THE EARTH** like this one, because nobody has thought of adding AI that shoot back for some reason?

**Q: Does the mod come with guns?**\
A: No. The mod does not come with its own firearms. I recommend using "Vic's Point Blank", or "TacZ" as mods to fight the AI with!

**Q: Fabric?**\
A: Right now? No. The project originally started out as a fabric 1.20.1 mod, however when I had first started the project there were not many gun mods for fabric. Now there are! So Fabric isn't out of scope.

**Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?**\
A: I actually hope that you use my mod in your modpack! I feel like some people out there (thanks to this mod), can now create "S.T.A.L.K.E.R" or "Insurgency" styled modpacks!!! Who knows, maybe someone will make a entire wave based mini-game. It's up to you! Just be sure to not claim my mod as your own, and give credit of course because nobody likes a meanie stealing work and saying it is theirs... ;-;

-------
### Recommended Mods:
**-TacZ (for Firearms) | Vic's Point Blank (For Firearms)**
